{"score": 8, "seo_title": "crescent moon through telescope's surprising detail", "yt_tags": ["moon", "telescope", "lunar phase", "space", "nature"], "topic_hashtag": "SpaceScience", "thumbnail_text": "SEE THE DARK SIDE", "hook": "This crescent hides a secret", "script": "This crescent hides a secret because the moon’s spin is locked—it keeps one face toward Earth. That’s why the view changes every night. Ever wondered why the moon wobbles a little like it’s nodding?", "sentiment": "positive"}
